script_text: The sentence itself often hides clues about hard words.
Those clues help you guess what the word means.
Listen. The fluffy cat curled up in the cozy blanket.
What does fluffy mean? Soft and puffy.
How did we know? The blanket and the cat. Those were clues!
Listen. The kid bounced high on the trampoline.
What does bounced mean? Jumped up and down!
Read the whole sentence, not just the tricky word!
Now you are ready to use sentence clues!
